blockingIssues.description: Storage migration drops unknown record fields by reconstructing a whitelisted object in migrateProfileRecord/migrateSummary, violating the no-silent-loss migration expectation.
listProfiles sweeps dead IDs from the profile index but does not delete malformed backing records, leaving orphan rows in IndexedDB.
SettingsSidebar Replace Share CTA navigates directly (`onClose(); navigate('/replace-share')`) and bypasses guardNav, allowing silent loss of unsaved settings edits.

Offline relay last-seen precedence is wrong in both RelayHealthPanel and relayHealthRowsFromRuntime (lastEventAt selected before lastDisconnectedAt), producing stale 'Last Seen' values after disconnect.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align ui-screen-worker verification requirements with feature contracts: clearly define when Playwright may be skipped and require explicit `followedProcedure: false` + deviations whenever required checks are omitted.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple m5-settings reviews reported `followedProcedure: true` while missing the skill-mandated Playwright step, or reported partial deviations only.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen runtime-worker procedure auditing by requiring `skillFeedback` presence in handoff and explicit deviation entries when agent-browser/required verification commands are skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: At least one runtime-worker handoff omitted `skillFeedback`; others marked full compliance despite missing required checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the 'no .skip additions' rule to explicitly allow or forbid environment-availability conditional skips (e.g., cargo-gated multi-device specs).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Current convention text conflicts with existing conditional `test.skip(...)` guards used in multi-device specs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten skill-selection guidance so settings-persistence/schema-migration features are assigned to ui-screen-worker unless runtime protocol wiring is the core work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m5-idb-migration was assigned runtime-worker despite runtime-worker guidance explicitly excluding pure settings persistence.

rejectedObservations.observation: Blocking finding that m5-relay-list-persist omitted relay-churn e2e coverage in commit e95ade9.
rejectedObservations.reason: superseded-by-followup-feature: fix-m5-relay-churn-multidevice-spec adds and validates src/e2e/multi-device/relay-churn.spec.ts in the same milestone.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated variants of the same Playwright/agent-browser procedure-compliance mismatch across several ui-screen-worker reviews.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: consolidated into one systemic suggested guidance update.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated runtime-worker compliance wording variants (missing required checks/skillFeedback).
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: consolidated into one systemic suggested guidance update.
